name: Quick Wheat Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine flours, oatmeal, brown sugar, orange peel, baking powder, baking soda, and lite salt until well blended.
3. Add buttermilk and egg white; stir only until ingredients are moistened.
4. Fold in sunflower seeds.
5. Lightly oil a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish; sprinkle lightly with wheat germ.
6. Pour batter into prepared dish.
7. Bake for 50-60 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. If necessary, cover loaf with foil during the last 15 minutes of baking to prevent overbrowning.
9. Cool bread in casserole dish for 10 minutes; turn onto wire rack.
10. Brush top of loaf with 1 teaspoon honey and sprinkle with additional 1 tablespoon sunflower seeds, if desired.
11. Serve warm or cool.
